name: Research Solutions, Inc.
business: Research Solutions is a vertical software-as-a-service (SaaS) and artificial intelligence (AI) company providing software and related services to help research-intensive organizations simplify the research process. It offers cloud-based SaaS platforms sold to corporate, academic, government and individual researchers via auto-renewing license agreements. The platforms also facilitate sale of published scientific, technical, and medical (STM) content as individual transactions.

exposures.sentence: The Platforms also include advanced AI ( Generative AI ) based assistants to help researchers understand the quality of the articles they are reviewing, speed up the review process, and to more fully understand how various research papers relate to each other.
